allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft Visual Studio" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName } })

PowerShell($vswhere = "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\Installer\\vswhere.exe"; Test-Path $vswhere; Write-Output "---"; $bt = "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022\\BuildTools"; Get-ChildItem -Path "$bt" -Filter "cl.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 -ExpandProperty FullName)

PowerShell($bt = "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022\\BuildTools"; Get-ChildItem -Path "$bt" -Filter "cmake.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem -Path "$bt" -Filter "ninja.exe" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName; Write-Output "---"; Test-Path "$bt\\Common7\\Tools\\VsDevCmd.bat")
